notes: Step 1 Master->lookup bridge. A loaded Master now answers rack searches instead of dead-ending at 'doesn't exist in any loaded EDP'. New master_findRack(query) resolver (read-only over the live _lastPhantomMaster handle, store as cold-start fallback): exact case-folded match on cab-key / rack id / rack name, then nested host dns. Wired as a fall-through into both rack-viewer lookups (rackViewer_request + rmSearch_request) — consulted ONLY on a legacy-store miss, ONLY on explicit submit (not mid-type), rendering via the existing master_rackToElevation + renderElevation engine and returning before the legacy drag tail (Master racks are view-only; no backing store). fn#2 deliberately does NOT set currentRackId for Master hits, so no downstream save/edit path can mutate a rack absent from loadRacks(). Soft-fail copy now reads 'EDP or Master'. Q3: 6 additive TYPE_COLORS aliases (sw->switch, pwr->pdu, stor->storage, cdu->storage, fw->other, cpu->server) so Master faceplates render colored, not grey, and match the Master elevation tab — additive only, legacy data never emits these keys. Deferred to Step 2: crashcart_pickRack (needs a rack-picker) and the deploy dashboard empty state (deployment-scoped). Additivity: every legacy path byte-for-byte unchanged. Verified: both inline scripts node --check OK, CSS balanced, three stamps aligned at v1.6.59.
